intent_cases.description: Classic diagnostic query should route to DIAGNOSTIC with sales+inventory+marketing+support
intent_cases.expected_output: DIAGNOSTIC query about sales performance, routing to sales, inventory, marketing, and support domains

intent_cases.description: Action query should route to ACTION with inventory domain
intent_cases.input: Fix the stockout problem and restock SKU-001.
intent_cases.expected_output: ACTION query targeting inventory domain, entities include SKU-001

intent_cases.description: Memory query should route to MEMORY
intent_cases.input: What did we do last time sales dropped like this?
intent_cases.expected_output: MEMORY query to retrieve past incidents with similar sales drop pattern

intent_cases.description: Hybrid query should route to HYBRID with inventory domain
intent_cases.input: Analyze the inventory issue and fix it.
intent_cases.expected_output: HYBRID query combining diagnostic analysis and action execution for inventory domain

intent_cases.description: Summary query should route to SUMMARY
intent_cases.input: Give me a summary of yesterday's performance.
intent_cases.expected_output: SUMMARY query for overall performance report across all domains for yesterday

synthesis_cases.description: RCA with all four agent findings — should identify stockout + campaign pause as root cause
context: Sales revenue dropped 35% to $31,525 with 230 orders (vs baseline 320).
SKU-001 Wireless Headphones Pro was out of stock all day, estimated $5,200 lost revenue.
SKU-002 Running Shoes X2 was out of stock all day, estimated $5,200 lost revenue.
SKU-003 Yoga Mat Premium was out of stock all day, estimated $5,200 lost revenue.
CAMP-001 Google Shopping — Electronics campaign was paused, $0 spend, -100% vs prior period.
Support tickets spiked 129% to 110 tickets; top complaint theme was 'Out of stock / can't purchase' at 55.4%.

synthesis_cases.description: RCA with only sales data — should note incomplete analysis and limited confidence
context: No inventory, marketing, or support data available.

synthesis_cases.description: RCA with all findings + past incident context — should reference historical precedent
synthesis_cases.input: Why did sales drop yesterday? Has this happened before?

similar_incidents.root_cause: SKU-001 stockout during Black Friday prep — restock resolved in 48h
similar_incidents.outcome: Revenue recovered to baseline within 2 days

context: SKU-001 Wireless Headphones Pro was out of stock.
Past incident on 2025-11-15: same SKU-001 stockout, resolved by restocking 500 units in 48 hours.

action_cases.description: State with 3 stockout SKUs should produce restock actions for each
action_cases.expected_output: Propose restock_product actions for SKU-001, SKU-002, SKU-003 and resume_campaign for CAMP-001 with justifications referencing the stockout data.

action_cases.description: State with only paused campaign (no stockout) should propose resume_campaign
action_cases.input: Our marketing is underperforming, take action.
action_cases.expected_output: Propose resume_campaign for CAMP-001 Google Shopping with justification referencing zero ROAS and paused status.

graph_cases.description: End-to-end diagnostic query should return structured root cause analysis
graph_cases.expected_output: Root cause analysis identifying stockout of top SKUs and paused Google Shopping campaign as primary drivers of the 35% revenue drop, with supporting evidence from inventory and support ticket data.
context: SKU-001, SKU-002, SKU-003 were all out of stock.
Google Shopping campaign CAMP-001 was paused.
Support tickets spiked 129% with top theme being out-of-stock complaints.

graph_cases.description: Memory query should return recall of past incidents, not a new analysis
graph_cases.input: What did we do last time this happened?
graph_cases.expected_output: Recall of past incidents similar to current situation, with actions taken and outcomes described.
